segments.text: Here comes Inglis, rushing in aggressively!
segments.original_text: さあイングリッツいきなり目の前に前を詰めてきた

segments.text: Takes it and counters with an up smash!
segments.original_text: 捨て身で耐えて上スマッシュで拳突き上げ

full_text: Here comes Inglis, rushing in aggressively! Straight approach! Takes it and counters with an up smash! Gets the KO!

corrections.original: ステビンが耐えて上スマッシュでへっこぶし突き上げ
corrections.corrected: 捨て身で耐えて上スマッシュで拳突き上げ
